heroTitle: Welcome to the Quarkus CMS Demo
heroSubtitle: A powerful, extensible headless content management system built on Quarkus
aboutText:
## About This Demo

This application showcases the capabilities of the Quarkus Headless CMS extension. It demonstrates schema-driven content types, draft/publish workflows, content relations, and API-driven content management.

The sample content includes articles, authors, categories, and tags — all linked together through relations and searchable via both REST and GraphQL APIs.
